security.csp: default-src 'self' data:; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:

bundle.shortDescription: An encrypted, local-only desktop health tracker
bundle.longDescription: Bayand is a privacy-first desktop health tracker. Health records are encrypted with AES-256-GCM at rest and stay on your device. Features include structured wellness logging, encrypted local storage, calendar navigation, JSON export, backups, and automatic locking. No network access, no telemetry.
